summary: Risk Engine v3 frontend integration testing complete. All 12 features tested and verified. Top Priority Card shows severity label (CRITICAL/HIGH PRIORITY), trajectory indicator, whyNow text from API, and red-tinted background for critical severity. CTA buttons correctly show 'Open Pod' for review intervention. Inbox rows display trajectory indicators for non-stable items only (stable items correctly hidden). Sarah Martinez with monitor intervention has NO suggested action link. riskScore and confidence are NOT exposed in UI. All existing functionality works - compose modal, navigation to pods, and roster navigation for 'Assign coach'.
critical_code_review_comments: All Risk Engine v3 fields properly implemented in TopPriorityCard and InboxRow components
Severity label displays correctly with data-testid='severity-label'
Trajectory indicator shows for improving/worsening, correctly hidden for stable
WhyNow text from API displayed with data-testid='why-now-text'
Intervention-based CTA logic working: review→'Open Pod', monitor→no action
Critical severity gets red-tinted background (fef2f2), high severity gets yellow (fefce8)
riskScore and confidence are NOT exposed in UI (hidden as required)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing seed data with 5 inbox items
context_for_next_testing_agent: Risk Engine v3 frontend integration fully verified. Test IDs: severity-label, why-now-text, trajectory-{worsening|stable|improving}, top-priority-card, suggested-action-{id}, open-pod-{id}, autopilot-approve-btn, autopilot-review-btn, compose-modal. Current data: Marcus Johnson (critical, improving, review), Olivia Anderson Duke (critical, improving, review), Olivia Anderson Stanford (high, stable, review), Jane Smith (medium, stable, nudge), Sarah Martinez (medium, improving, monitor - NO action link).

verified_features.1_severity_label: PASS - Top Priority Card shows 'CRITICAL' label with data-testid='severity-label'
verified_features.2_trajectory_indicator_in_card: PASS - Shows '↘ Improving' next to severity label
verified_features.3_whyNow_text: PASS - Displays 'Escalated and inactive — needs immediate attention' from API
verified_features.4_critical_red_background: PASS - Card has rgb(254, 242, 242) background for critical severity
verified_features.5_review_cta_open_pod: PASS - Review intervention shows 'Open Pod →' button
verified_features.6_inbox_trajectory_improving: PASS - Marcus, Olivia Duke, Sarah show ↘ Improving indicator
verified_features.7_inbox_stable_no_indicator: PASS - Stanford, Jane Smith (stable) have NO trajectory indicator
verified_features.8_monitor_no_action: PASS - Sarah Martinez (monitor) has NO suggested action link
verified_features.9_nudge_assign_coach: PASS - Jane Smith 'Assign coach' navigates to /roster
verified_features.10_riskScore_hidden: PASS - riskScore NOT displayed anywhere in UI
verified_features.11_confidence_hidden: PASS - confidence NOT displayed anywhere in UI
verified_features.12_existing_functionality: PASS - Open Pod navigation, compose modal, all working
